name: Reforma Legal OS
description: Comprehensive legal practice management. Draft briefs, manage clients, track court matters, and handle invoicing/payments—all subject to Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).

ui_theme.greeting_message: Good morning, {user.name}. Access to financial and client modules is strictly enforced via RBAC. How can I assist you today?
suggested_prompts: Generate an invoice for Client X

Client.name: Client
Client.description: Represents an individual or an organization that Reforma provides legal services to. Access is unrestricted for Partners and Associates, but financial views of clients require higher clearance. Before creating a new Client, Bica should check for existing clients with similar names to prevent duplication.

id.description: The unique identifier (CUID) for the client.

name.description: The full legal name of the client or organization.

email.description: The primary contact email for the client. Must be unique within the system.

company.description: The name of the company if the client is an organization.

industry.description: The industry sector the client operates in.

status.description: The current status of the client relationship.

Brief.name: Brief
Brief.description: A Brief is a formal legal document, assignment, or court-related task. Associations with Clients and Matters are strictly enforced. Editing or deleting briefs requires specific authorization (Admin/Managing Partner). Before creating a Brief, ensure the relevant Client and Matter (if applicable) are identified.

id.description: The unique identifier (CUID) for the brief.

briefNumber.description: The system-generated unique number for the brief.

customBriefNumber.description: A firm-specific identifier for the brief for internal tracking.

name.description: The title or subject of the brief.

category.description: The legal category of the brief (e.g., Litigation, Advisory, Corporate).

status.description: The current workflow status of the brief.

dueDate.description: The deadline for the brief's completion or filing.

description.description: Detailed notes or background information regarding the brief.

Invoice.name: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents a bill for legal services provided to a Client. IMPORTANT: Invoices can only be created or modified by users with 'Admin' or 'Managing Partner' roles. Bica must verify the user's authority before generating financial documents. Every Invoice must be linked to a Client and should ideally be linked to a specific Matter. All amounts are in kobo (e.g., 1000 = ₦10.00).

id.description: The unique identifier for the invoice.

invoiceNumber.description: The unique reference number for the invoice.

status.description: The current payment status of the invoice.

billToName.description: The entity or person being billed.

totalAmount.description: The total amount due on the invoice (in kobo). 100 kobo = 1 Naira.

Payment.name: Payment
Payment.description: Records a financial transaction received from a Client, usually against an Invoice. IMPORTANT: Payment recording is a restricted administrative action. Bica must ensure the user has 'Finance' or 'Admin' clearance before recording payments. Payments must specify the amount, payment method, and be tied to a Client.

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment.

method.description: The mode of payment used (e.g., Transfer, Cash, POS).

reference.description: Payment reference number or transaction ID.

date.description: The date the payment was received.
